responseMessageContents.text:
The user is asking me to finish end-to-end and send a security box to share their GitHub Token credentials. They want to provide credentials securely.

Looking at the conversation history, we've been dealing with:
1. A dead GITHUB_TOKEN that needs replacement
2. Task orchestrator that was fake-completing tasks
3. Need to deploy and verify

The user is now asking me to provide a way to securely share their GitHub Token. I have the `requestEnvs` tool which is designed for this purpose. It shows a widget with input fields for environment variables.

I should use requestEnvs to ask for the GitHub credentials securely. The tool will collect the credentials without exposing them in chat.

Let me set up the env variables needed:
- GITHUB_TOKEN
- GITHUB_REPO_URL
- RENDER_API_KEY
- RENDER_SERVICE_ID

These are private environment variables, so isPublic should be false for all.

The user wants to finish end-to-end, so I need to:
1. Collect the credentials securely
2. Then test them
3. Fix the orchestrator
4. Deploy all tasks
5. Provide final proof

But first, I need to collect the credentials using requestEnvs.

I should also acknowledge the screenshots - they show the audit findings about the GITHUB_TOKEN being dead/revoked and task orchestrator using placeholder evidence. The user wants to proceed with fixing this.

Let me call requestEnvs with the credentials needed.
I'll open the secure credential box now. Fill these in and I'll test, fix the orchestrator, deploy, and verify live.

envs.name: GITHUB_TOKEN
envs.description: GitHub Personal Access Token with repo scope for the ivx-holdings repo. Used for git commit and push from the task orchestrator. Rork will never log, print, or commit this value.

envs.name: GITHUB_REPO_URL
envs.description: Full HTTPS URL of the IVX GitHub repository, e.g. https://github.com/owner/repo.git

envs.name: RENDER_API_KEY
envs.description: Render API key used to trigger deploys for the IVX backend service. Already configured in project; only update if rotating.

envs.name: RENDER_SERVICE_ID
envs.description: Render service ID for the IVX backend (e.g. srv-xxxxxxxx). Already known; update only if changed.

input.reason: Unblocking the IVX senior-developer task orchestrator: the current GitHub token is dead (401), so tasks cannot commit, push, or deploy. These credentials are needed to finish the end-to-end fix, deploy all 32 tasks, and verify live production.
